summary: Compared all 12 normalized segments against draft1 and recorded only provisional terminology and title-meaning judgments for carry-forward.

issues.detail: Segment 002 title term Paṭiññā could support multiple Korean renderings; keep current choice provisional.
Draft1 intentionally uses transliterated doctrinal terms because no approved project glossary exists yet.

next_recommended_action: Reflect the review notes in draft2 while keeping doctrinal labels visibly provisional for later human review.
